# Command-line Usage

`sample-project` ships a small CLI. See [overview](overview.md)
and [tutorial](tutorial.md) for the library API.

## Synopsis

```bash
sample-project mean 1 2 3 4 5
```

Prints the mean to stdout.

## Options

- `--precision N` — decimal places in the output. Default: 6.

See [changelog](changelog.md) for option history.
